drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching to improve placement accuracy.

drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening to build confidence in positioning.

progression_note: Strong intermediate performance with excellent time efficiency. Focus on refining placement precision to achieve more consistent mark alignment while maintaining your current speed advantage.
